title: Earnings Call: Zillow Group Reports Strong Q3 2023 Performance, Outlines Growth Strategy
text: Zillow Q3 2023 Earnings Call and Growth Strategy. Q3 2023 Performance Summary: Zillow reported strong Q3 2023 performance despite macroeconomic headwinds. Revenue of $496 million represented 3% year-over-year growth. Adjusted EBITDA came in at $107 million, $30 million above guidance midpoint. Key Strategic Initiatives: Rental Market Expansion: Management highlighted the rental business as a key growth driver, with multifamily revenue growing 42% year-over-year. The company outlined plans to expand multifamily property coverage. Technology Integration: Discussion of technology improvements and user experience enhancements to drive engagement. Mortgage Business Resilience: Despite higher interest rates dampening mortgage demand, purchase loan origination volumes grew 88% year-over-year, demonstrating strong market share gains. Market Positioning: Management emphasized Zillow's position as the leading real estate platform with significant competitive advantages. Forward Outlook: The company expressed confidence in continued growth despite near-term interest rate and housing market challenges. Emphasis on long-term value creation through diversification across residential, mortgages, and rentals segments.
